subject: New courses: Agentic AI with LangChain
body:
+ AWS ML Engineer certification prep

🚀 Just launched: LangGraph + AWS Certifcation

*Note: You are receiving this platform-related update because you have an active Educative account. If you wish to unsubscribe from product or other updates related to your account, you can do so anytime.

Денис, here is your access to two new courses:

FEATURED COURSE

Grokking the AWS Certified Machine Learning Engineer - Associate

Start Learning → (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/MVXB9hdh0myW4pVBXP4n9n7kW4qM5Xr5NLTfhN67vcmW5m_5PW5BWr2F6lZ3lJW3db1Cw1YJyMpW8w-TZV37Y7Q-W99cKqr1K5HRjW3k7VVl8KF1BsW1-JnQP4KT3J1W5YBCZd6C0MTCW3TFBzT6Wk9NFW41sL8h8b0l_9W3gspBN6GLPwtW2s7DmZ4nrQ86W16gMdB4wrPLKVY7qfY94YZc3W6qX3vf6svyrXW17HtsC1bqy0zW8CL-qr8HttYnW3GpH6Y8kRmrwW4Cqrvv90L5V3W5T4Gcd5rhVsbW4xmFjW3l2d4yW1YffS06kbGnCVMRvqG9gdxD3W7PpTQ11gtrR_N5GsQln6sfN8W51CkL16pkSlNVt24q05JpJPXN5GM757dxc1BN8vHkP34-czTW4rb4z28-vJSnW3d0fg75_Vy9LW8hqWWs4z_y2sMlfSxh2PGfLW3C3TB_2j2mvYW73X8dn7VwS6kW4y94Vw3RYsjNf3tdTK-04 )

Operationalize the ML lifecycle and advance your engineering career by becoming an AWS Certified Machine Learning Engineer. Learn automated deployment pipelines and scalable ML infrastructure.

FEATURED COURSE

LangGraph: From LangChain User to Agent Builder

Start Learning → (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/MVXB9hdh0myW4pVBXP4n9n7kW4qM5Xr5NLTfhN67vcmW5m_5PW5BWr2F6lZ3kJVbW6nY4kyz44W6gb7nq3sMjlRW8YVm1t6s__QmW5rjL2v1lf4vGW1tJm1p3Rd_bGV20r--3rpk6hVzjs_N77C1T0W8n9-qk8vc_k9W4FCvpN5lXrDSW9ggKr78S_B_fW7d7BVg13XRd3W3-m9_z7C_TLNVxVGbz8KC-FTW5ll1P94_MDtJW4Rvrqx7yp5NkVZLCrk2ytGfPW8yy8cx8wb_DBVxRzBf8pPBQ3W1C-WZk7zDTGnW4b8y2s45P6ZcW8pdNDv2JH4tqW2GzCfr20kFZmW8cxBqF2QHbPtW69XgcT7H03yLW15cRrl51Z3QHW5nJgfq3Yv4Z3VWxhwL57_nXqW7gJHcs8Jf_CVW62fhPN2Qmm2KVLpTF-5gbBxjW5Gmdyh3KMHb3VMP-hH8Shg14VnhQdp1HR7NrW1ffKc797jpYMf3LT2Lz04 )

Master LangGraph to build reliable, stateful AI workflows with memory, loops, and routing. Upgrade your skills from linear chains to advanced control flow.
